title: 无标题文章
summary: We are a reflection of the universe, a self-aware piece observing the surrounding cosmos, we're literally made of stars, and we should treat each other as such. Because when I get old I should be able to grow 50x my size, consume every object in my vicinity, then later go supernova and kill everything within any discernible distance
content: We are a reflection of the universe, a self-aware piece observing the surrounding cosmos, we're literally made of stars, and we should treat each other as such. Because when I get old I should be able to grow 50x my size, consume every object in my vicinity, then later go supernova and kill everything within any discernible distance
